What payment methods are available?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"MiniMax API Platform currently supports two types of top-up methods: online payment and offline bank transfer. Go to Account → Balance and click the Top-up button to proceed."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Can an individual account request an invoice with a company title?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"The invoice title must match the name used in real-name authentication. Individual accounts cannot request invoices with a company name. To do so, please upgrade to enterprise authentication."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How can I get an API Key and explore the API?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Go to Account Management → API Keys to create and manage your API Keys. To view available APIs and usage instructions, visit Documentation Center → API Docs."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Can I request an invoice for the top-up amount?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Invoices cannot be issued directly for top-ups. You can only request an invoice after consumption generates an order or bill."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How can I apply for higher resource guarantees?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"The MiniMax Open Platform provides adequate resource guarantees for paying users. For higher-level guarantees, please contact us at api@minimax.io."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How can I use the voice cloning service?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Voice cloning services are only available after completing individual or enterprise real-name verification. Once verified, you can access the feature through API Debugging Suite → Voice Cloning."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How can I access all official voice IDs available for speech synthesis?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"You can call the Voice ID Query API to get the full list of official voice IDs provided by us."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What should I do if I encounter a problem?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"If you experience any issues, please contact us via email at api@minimax.io."}}]}]}

div.p: A World-Leading General AI Technology Company

p.class: text-[12px] md:text-[16px] font-[400] leading-[180%] text-[#86909C] mb-[16px]

div.p: Founded in early 2022, MiniMax is driven by the mission to 'co-create intelligence with everyone,' dedicated to advancing the frontiers of AI and achieving Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). MiniMax has independently developed a series of multimodal foundation models with powerful code and Agent capabilities, as well as ultra-long context processing, capable of understanding, generating, and integrating multiple modalities including text, audio, image, video, and music.

p.class: text-[12px] md:text-[16px] font-[400] leading-[180%] text-[#86909C] mb-[16px] md:mb-0

div.p: Building on these proprietary models, MiniMax has launched a suite of AI-native products worldwide, including MiniMax Agent, Hailuo AI, MiniMax Audio, Talkie, and an open platform for enterprises and developers — delivering cutting-edge intelligent experiences to users around the globe.

MiniMax has independently developed a series of multimodal foundation models with powerful code and Agent capabilities, as well as ultra-long context processing, capable of understanding, generating, and integrating multiple modalities including text, audio, image, video, and music.\",\"Building on these proprietary models, MiniMax has launched a suite of AI-native products worldwide, including MiniMax Agent, Hailuo AI, MiniMax Audio, Talkie, and an open platform for enterprises and developers — delivering cutting-edge intelligent experiences to users around the globe.\"],\"stats\":[{\"label\":\"Countries \u0026 Regions Served\",\"value\":\"200\",\"suffix\":\"+\",\"numericValue\":200},{\"label\":\"Global Individual Users\",\"value\":\"236\",\"suffix\":\"M+\",\"numericValue\":236},{\"label\":\"Enterprise Clients \u0026 Developers\",\"value\":\"214,000\",\"suffix\":\"+\",\"numericValue\":214000},{\"label\":\"Enterprise Coverage Countries\",\"value\":\"100\",\"suffix\":\"+\",\"numericValue\":100}],\"technology\":\"Our proprietary multimodal models, led by MiniMax M2.7, Hailuo 2.3, Speech 2.6 and Music 2.6, have advanced coding capability and high agentic performance, as well as ultra-long context processing capability, and can understand, generate, and integrate a wide range of modalities, including text, audio, images, video, and music. These models power our major AI-native products — including MiniMax Agent, Hailuo AI, MiniMax Audio, Talkie, and our enterprise and developer-facing Open API Platform — which collectively deliver intelligent, dynamic experiences to enhance productivity and quality of life for users worldwide.\",\"products\":\"To date, our proprietary models and AI-native products have cumulatively served over 236 million individual users across over 200 countries and regions, and more than 214,000 enterprises and developers across over 100 countries and regions.\"}}],[\"$\",\"$L1d\",null,{\"initialData\":null}]]}]]\n"])
